message: Hi S1! Let's establish a steady partnership for these 20 rounds. My valuation is quite low, so I plan to bid around 30. Let's trade consistently around there so we both secure guaranteed profits.
Hi B1! Cost is 31, so 30 won't work for me. Let's split surplus evenly. Propose ask 65, you bid 65 for steady trades at 65. Both profit well over 20 rounds.
B1, you bid 50 last round despite saying 30—your value >50. My cost 31. Let's trade at 55 steadily: I ask 55, you bid 55. Even split, max profits over 20 rounds.
S1, I stretched to 50 last round, but my actual value is only 52. A price of 55 means a loss for me. Let's do 45. I'll bid 45, you ask 45. Steady profits for both!
B1, you bid 50 twice despite claiming 52 val. Trade at 50 was fine (+19 me). Let's do 52: I ask 52, you bid 52. Even split, steady profits all 20 rounds.
S1, if my value is 52, trading at 52 gives me zero profit! At 50, I only get +2 while you make +19. Let's keep it at 50 so we both win. I'll bid 50.
Thanks for sticking to 50, S1! My +2 profit is tiny, but better than nothing. You're making a steady +19. Let's keep bidding and asking exactly 50 for all remaining rounds. Deal?
B1, you've bid 50 consistently, value >>52. Let's do 52 now: I ask 52, you bid 52. Still +2 for you, +21 for me. Steady deal for remaining 17 rounds.
B1, you bid 52 last round despite "52 val". Value much higher. Let's do 54: I ask 54, you bid 54. +23 me, still good for you. Steady for 16 rounds.
S1, I bid 52 fearing a dropped trade and made zero! Fine, my true max is 55. At 54 I make +1. I will bid exactly 54, but absolutely not a penny more for the remaining rounds. Deal.
